compiled_state.title: RED test: gate-2c-test-regression-check.py behavioral tests
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create tests/scripts/test_gate_2c_test_regression_check.py with pytest behavioral tests. Each test creates temp Python test files, generates unified diffs, pipes to the script via subprocess.

Tests (14 cases):
1. test_removes_assertion — assertEqual removed -> triggered:true
2. test_broadens_matcher — assertEqual(x,42) -> assertIsNotNone(x) -> triggered:true
3. test_reduces_assertion_count — 5 assertions to 3 -> triggered:true
4. test_adds_skip — @pytest.mark.skip added -> triggered:true
5. test_adds_xfail — @pytest.mark.xfail added -> triggered:true
6. test_specific_to_specific_int — assertEqual(x,42) -> assertEqual(x,57) -> triggered:false
7. test_specific_to_specific_str — assertEqual(x,"foo") -> assertEqual(x,"bar") -> triggered:false
8. test_specific_to_variable — assertEqual(x,42) -> assertEqual(x,result) -> triggered:true (literal to variable is specificity reduction)
9. test_adds_assertion — new assertion added -> triggered:false
10. test_intent_aligned_suppression — --intent-aligned + removal -> triggered:false
11. test_no_test_files — diff only source files -> triggered:false
12. test_emits_gate_signal_json — gate_id "2c", signal_type "primary"
13. test_malformed_diff — non-parseable -> triggered:false (graceful)
14. test_mixed_removal_and_addition — removal + addition in same file -> triggered:true (any removal is independent signal)

Test approach: create temp .py files with assertion patterns, diff before/after versions, pipe to script with --test-dir. Assert on stdout JSON.

Trigger policy: triggered if ANY assertion removal, broadening, skip/xfail, or literal-to-variable pattern detected, regardless of additions.

.test-index: plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2c-test-regression-check.py: tests/scripts/test_gate_2c_test_regression_check.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test_gate_2c_test_regression_check.py
- [ ] At least 14 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/scripts/test_gate_2c_test_regression_check.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 14)}'
- [ ] Tests use subprocess (behavioral)
  Verify: grep -q 'subprocess' tests/scripts/test_gate_2c_test_regression_check.py
- [ ] .test-index entry
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-2c-test-regression-check' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests written and committed
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
